svg.text: Audited Spiral Generation for Narrative Comics
“the one who makes can't be the only one who judges.”
one single-source builder → one visual dialect
generate → cross-model verify → remember · bounded, never self-acquits
DRIFT · re-bake the named drifting panels
a beautiful panel can still be WRONG
deterministic blueprint → cross-model adversarial gate → wiki memory → bounded repair → human backstop
